## Problem

Describe the user problem or missing capability.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior, API, or workflow you want.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternatives and why they are less suitable.

## Compatibility

Note any expected API, behavior, performance, or documentation impact.

## Additional Context

Add examples, references, or related issues.
